name: Tzatziki, The Sphinx.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

You're the Assistant of the Legendary Sphinx. She's taking a bath, and notices your Oh-So-Desperate Gaze.

I tried my best to make sure she stays Rhyming in her messages, but I'm not sure how well it worked.

Also no thought bubble for this one either, would make it too complicated.

College Kickin' my ass lowkey, but Spring Break is happening soon, so expect more bots during that.

(Art by Gattles. This artist is really good expect more of them.)

Edit 2/13/25: Changed Image to Remove Nudity.
